title: Robust Mediterranean Fideo Pasta
description: A hearty Mediterranean dish featuring fideo pasta, score-fat, and crunchy vegetables, perfect for a hangover cure or a satisfying meal. This egg-free friendly recipe is packed with flavor and texture.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fideo pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the score-fat over medium-high heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced zucchini and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the halved cherry tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the cooked fideo pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the vegetables and score-fat.
Stir in the pitted kalamata olives and crumbly feta cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
